subcodes.first_line: O Hashim! 'Abdu'l-Bahá regardeth thee as one of His trusted and longstanding friends. Be thou assured that the dissolution of the Assembly of Unity stemmed from an excess of trust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هاشم عبدالبهاء تو از یاران قدیمی مطمئن باش فسخ محفل اتحاد از شدت اعتماد
